title: Expired token causes 500 on profile API
body:
Version: 1.2.0
On Linux, calling GET /api/profile with an expired JWT returns 500.
Expected: the API should return 401.
Log: TokenExpiredError in validate_token.

title: Profile endpoint returns 500 for expired JWT token
body:
Version: 1.1.0
Steps to reproduce: login, wait for the JWT token to expire, then request /api/profile. TokenExpiredError is not converted to a 401 response.

title: Add dark mode to the settings page
body: Feature request: support a dark theme in the frontend settings page.
